title: Create My Service Canada Account - Canada.ca
content:
## Create a My Service Canada Account
Creating an account takes just a few steps. This is a one-time action. The next time you visit, all you have to do is sign in.
- be at least 12 years old
- access and use MSCA only as yourself. No one is authorized to use or create an account on your behalf.
- Interac ® Sign-In Partner Use your online banking sign in information

### Interac ® Sign-In Partner
Use your online banking sign in information
- GCKey Use your username and password issued by the Government of Canada or sign up for a GCKey
Use your username and password issued by the Government of Canada or sign up for a GCKey
- Provincial sign-in Use your Alberta.ca Account or BC Services Card
Use your Alberta.ca Account or BC Services Card
The registration number is on your birth certificate, which is issued by your province or territory after you are born.
How to find your registration number (open in a new window)
It is an identification number (client ID) issued by Immigration, Refugees and Citizenship Canada.
More information about the Unique Client Identifier (open in a new window)
We can send you a code to verify your identity. This code has 7 digits. You need to request it from Service Canada.
Request a Personal Access Code (open in a new window)
It is a 12-character number that you receive after submitting your online SIN application

### Great, you can proceed!
- your GCKey username and password
- your Social Insurance Number (SIN)
- your personal access code (PAC)
- your SIN application number
- your Birth Registration Number
- your Unique Client Identifier (UCI)
- your online banking information
Start your registration
By clicking “Start your registration”, you will be able to create a GCKey username and password if you don't already have one.
Start your registration

### Great, you can proceed!
- your provincial sign-in information

### You will not be able to create an account right now
To create an account, you need to apply for a Social Insurance Number (SIN) .

### You will not be able to create an account right now
For help, contact Service Canada:
- In person at a Service Canada office

### You will not be able to create an account using this method
If you don't have an Alberta.ca Account or a BC Services Card, please choose another sign in method.

### You will not be able to create an account right now
To proceed, you either need to change one of your answers above or request a personal access code from Service Canada.
- online : get it by mail in 5 to 10 business days
- in person: get it right away at a Service Canada location near you
- by phone: this option is only available for returning clients of the Canada Pension Plan

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
